title: Cnut the Great becomes King of Norway
fact: Cnut, also known as Canute and with the epithet the Great, was King of England from 1016, King of Denmark from 1018, and King of Norway from 1028 until his death in 1035.

title: Harald V of Norway becomes King of Norway
fact: Harald V is King of Norway, reigning since 1991.

title: Charles XIV John of Sweden becomes King of Norway
fact: Charles XIV John was King of Sweden and Norway from 1818 until his death in 1844 and the first monarch of the Bernadotte dynasty.

title: Olav V of Norway becomes King of Norway
fact: Olav V was King of Norway from 1957 until his death in 1991.

title: Harald Fairhair becomes King of Norway
fact: Harald Fairhair was a Norwegian king.

title: Haakon VII of Norway becomes King of Norway
fact: Haakon VII was King of Norway from 1905 until his death in 1957, having reigned for nearly 52 years.

title: Sweyn I of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Swein Forkbeard was King of Denmark from 986, King of England for five weeks from December 1013, and King of Norway from 999/1000, all until his death in 1014.

title: Oscar I of Sweden becomes King of Norway
fact: Oscar I was King of Sweden and Norway from 8 March 1844 until his death.

title: Olaf II of Norway becomes King of Norway
fact: Saint Olaf, also called Olaf the Holy, Olaf II, Olaf Haraldsson, and Olaf the Stout or "Large", was King of Norway from 1015 to 1028.

title: Margaret I of Denmark becomes Queen of Norway
fact: Margaret I was queen regnant of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden from the late 1380s until her death, and the founder of the Kalmar Union that joined the Scandinavian kingdoms together for over a century.

title: Christian VII of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Christian VII was King of Denmark and Norway and Duke of Schleswig and Holstein from 1766 until his death in 1808.

title: Frederick VI of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Frederick VI was King of Denmark from 13 March 1808 until his death in 1839 and King of Norway from 13 March 1808 to 7 February 1814.

title: Oscar II of Sweden becomes King of Norway
fact: Oscar II was King of Sweden from 1872 until his death in 1907 and King of Norway from 1872 to 1905.

title: Magnus the Good becomes King of Norway
fact: Magnus Olafsson, better known as Magnus the Good, was King of Norway from 1035 and King of Denmark from 1042 until his death in 1047.

title: Christian II of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Christian II, a monarch under the Kalmar Union, reigned as King of Denmark and Norway from 1513 until 1523.

title: Christian IV of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Christian IV was King of Denmark and Norway and Duke of Holstein and Schleswig from 1588 until his death in 1648.

title: Eric Bloodaxe becomes King of Norway
fact: Eric Haraldsson, nicknamed Bloodaxe and Brother-Slayer, was a Norwegian king.

title: Charles XIII of Sweden becomes King of Norway
fact: Charles XIII or Carl XIII was King of Sweden from 1809 and King of Norway from 1814 to his death.

title: Christian I of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Christian I (Christiern I) was a German noble and Scandinavian monarch under the Kalmar Union.

title: Christian III of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Christian III reigned as King of Denmark from 1534 and King of Norway from 1537 until his death in 1559.

title: Frederick I of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Frederick I was King of Denmark and Norway from 1523 and 1524, respectively, until his death in 1533, and earlier co-duke Duke of Schleswig and Holstein.

title: Frederick V of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Frederick V was King of Denmark and Norway and Duke of Schleswig-Holstein from 6 August 1746 until his death in 1766.

title: Frederick II of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Frederick II was King of Denmark and Norway and Duke of Schleswig and Holstein from 1559 until his death in 1588.

title: Carl XV of Sweden becomes King of Norway
fact: Charles XV and IV was King of Sweden and King of Norway, there often referred to as Charles IV, from 8 July 1859 until his death in 1872.

title: Frederick III of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Frederick III was King of Denmark and Norway from 1648 until his death in 1670.

title: Frederik IV of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Frederick IV was King of Denmark and Norway from 1699 until his death.

title: Sigurd the Crusader becomes King of Norway
fact: Sigurd the Crusader, also known as Sigurd Magnusson and Sigurd I, was King of Norway from 1103 to 1130.

title: Olaf II of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Olaf II of Denmark was King of Denmark as Olaf II from 1376 and King of Norway as Olav IV from 1380 until his death.

title: Magnus Barefoot becomes King of Norway
fact: Magnus III Olafsson, better known as Magnus Barefoot, was the King of Norway from 1093 until his death in 1103.

title: Christian V of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Christian V was King of Denmark and Norway from 1670 until his death in 1699.

title: Olaf III of Norway becomes King of Norway
fact: Olaf III or Olaf Haraldsson, known as Olaf the Peaceful, was King of Norway from 1067 until his death in 1093.

title: Christopher of Bavaria becomes King of Norway
fact: Christopher of Bavaria was King of Denmark, Sweden (1441–48) and Norway (1442–48) during the era of the Kalmar Union.

title: Haakon IV of Norway becomes King of Norway
fact: Haakon IV Haakonsson, sometimes called Haakon the Old in contrast to his namesake son, was King of Norway from 1217 to 1263.

title: Christian VIII of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Christian VIII was King of Denmark from 1839 to 1848 and, as Christian Frederick, King of Norway in 1814.

title: Haakon the Good becomes King of Norway
fact: Haakon Haraldsson, also Haakon the Good and Haakon Adalsteinfostre, was the king of Norway from 934 to 961.

title: Magnus IV of Sweden becomes King of Norway
fact: Magnus Eriksson was King of Sweden from 1319 to 1364, King of Norway as Magnus VII from 1319 to 1355, and ruler of Scania from 1332 to 1360.

title: Sverre of Norway becomes King of Norway
fact: Sverre Sigurdsson was the king of Norway from 1184 to 1202.

title: Christian VI of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Christian VI was King of Denmark and Norway from 1730 to 1746.

title: John, King of Denmark becomes King of Norway
fact: Hans, or sometimes called John was a Scandinavian monarch who ruled under the Kalmar Union.

title: Eric II of Norway becomes King of Norway
fact: Eric Magnusson was king of Norway from 1280 until 1299.

title: Karl Knutsson becomes King of Norway
fact: Karl Knutsson Bonde, also known as Charles VIII and called Charles I in Norwegian contexts, was King of Sweden and King of Norway (1449–1450).

title: Haakon VI of Norway becomes King of Norway
fact: Haakon VI was King of Norway from 1343 until his death and King of Sweden between 1362 and 1364.

title: Haakon V of Norway becomes King of Norway
fact: Haakon V Magnusson was King of Norway from 1299 until 1319.

title: Magnus VI of Norway becomes King of Norway
fact: Magnus the Lawmender, also known as Magnus Haakonsson, was King of Norway from 1263 to 1280.
